title: Literally Optimized
description: Optimized with all possible mods for low-end PC's.
body:
### LITERALLY OPTIMIZED

 
 
**Purpose:**

We want to increase the performance as much as possible for low end PCs.


**No Unnecessary Mods**

This modpack only contains optimization mods. This means you will have the highest FPS possible.


**Made With Fabric**

We used Fabric Mod Loader for the best performance since it is lightweight.


### **FPS Comparison Between Optifine and Literally Optimized:**



**Optifine:**
![Optifine 1.21.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74efc10503ba5fb72e0ec2e6debd334203916efa_0.webp)
_Optifine_ 1.21.1 got **352 FPS.**

**Literally Optimized:**
![Literally Optimized 1.21.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7523cb12f957f961e0a4e3d1cd36d73644712374_0.webp)
_Literally Optimized_ 1.21.1 got **757 FPS.**


**Tested with:**

**CPU:** AMD Ryzen 5 5600G

**GPU:** NVIDIA Geforce GTX 1650

**RAM:** 8GB DDR4 3200MHz

The difference can be so much higher on a high-end PC. You can always give us ideas and report bugs in our modpack. Have Fun!
